name: Timothy Ekomobong Joseph
quote: Being in UNDS has challenged everything I thought I had overcome. The nerves, stage fright, debate pride , etc. As I continue to grow in the club I am besides myself with excitement to see how far it will take me

name: Greg
achievements:
Champion ANT '26
2nd Best PS Adjudicator Kampala Opens
quote:
UNDS became a sort of home for me very quickly. The people are warm, so warm that your very first meeting becomes your first and best bonding experience. UNDS gives you the avenue to learn all the time, to connect, to experience, to feel, to fail, to survive, to conquer. 
I couldn't be happier.

name: Madu, Ogochukwu Zita
quote:
I was attracted to UNDS when I saw the then president of UNDS, speak as a judge in a debate competition. The way he spoke,....I was in awe. 
UNDS made me want to know more. I am a better person today because of this.
Though my encounter with them has been irregular, due to the school calendar among other reasons,  I am always proud of being a member of UNDS.

name: Uzoma Dominion Maduakonam
role: Content writer | LinkedIn ghost writer | Student
quote: I love UNDS. And this might sound cliché, because of course I'll love the organization I belong to. But UNDS made me believe that winning arguments and sounding intelligent is not inborn. It is indeed a skill. A skill that can be learnt. I like that I am now convenient consuming information on topics that are far from my interests. (It's still a hassle but I try.) I like that I became a part of this group of intelligent and amazing debaters.

name: Agbo Joy Ifeoma
quote:
UNDS has helped in sharpening my communication and critical thinking skills.
Through it, I have networked with extremely brilliant individuals who have mastered the art of articulating their thoughts effectively.

name: Abundance Anozie
achievements: Best Female Speaker, War of Words 2024
quote: UNDS helped me bridge the gap between talent and skill. I’ve always loved debating right from my early childhood days, I would always perform in school debate's tournaments fueled solely by passion. Coming in contact with UNDS I realized that there's a difference between talent and skill, and that debate was not just about passion, but also about skill. So I'm grateful to UNDS for that opportunity to build skills beyond talent and passion.

name: Obidike Chidubem Cyprain
role: 200 level student of Arts education ( English unit)
quote: Beyond the beauty of achievements in external tournaments and beautiful speaks is the steady and consistent trainings,and steady spar sessions which UNDS has provided which I'm entirely grateful for.

name: Francisca Mbanwusi
quote:
When I joined UNDS in my first year, it felt like I had finally found my people. The things that made me seem ""different"" elsewhere were simply normal here, and that sense of belonging meant everything.
Looking back, joining the Debate Society was one of the best decisions I made as a student. I would recommend it to any student looking for a place that fosters all-round growth. The skills, confidence, and friendships you build will stay with you long after university.

name: Afam Ugwuanyi
quote: UNDS has been something. The opportunities, to learn, to grow, and to realise that to even the most "basic" of idea, that there is deeper meanings. I've learnt to understand that no one is ever completely wrong, and that alone, has profoundly changed my view and interactions for the better
